evidence: evidence: PR title/merge commit says "resolve data race".
evidence: diff uses atomic.LoadInt64(&commitDetails.CommitBackoffTime) to avoid concurrent read/write (util/stmtsummary/statement_summary.go).

evidence: PR title/merge commit says "fix random \"IsolationRead\" fails".
evidence: PR body: "The server-level config of isolation read affects all tests for different test suites"; makes testIntegrationSuite not parallel.

evidence: diff narrows global config side-effect window: set config.GetGlobalConfig().IsolationRead.Engines = []string{"tiflash"} then resets to []string{"tikv", "tiflash", "tidb"} immediately after tk.Exec (planner/core/integration_test.go).
files: planner/core/integration_test.go, planner/core/planbuilder.go
evidence: PR body mentions leak check "failed to find leaked go routines" and a ddl test "forgot to close mvccStore" causing goroutine leak.
evidence: diff adds mvccStore.Close() via defer to avoid goroutine/resource leak in ddl test (ddl/serial_test.go).
evidence: diff fixes test leak infra to avoid re-init beforeTestGoroutines after BeforeTest(), using testGoroutinesInited flag (util/testleak/leaktest.go).
files: util/testleak/leaktest.go, ddl/serial_test.go, store/mockstore/mocktikv/rpc.go
evidence: PR body: "high concurrency would leads to unstable (randomly failed) tests" and explicitly reverts #14639.
evidence: diff reverts ddl test suite re-distribution changes (ddl/db_partition_test.go, ddl/db_test.go).
files: ddl/db_partition_test.go, ddl/db_test.go
evidence: PR body: tests have global side effects (config.GetGlobalConfig().Security.SkipGrantTable / MemQuotaQuery) causing other tests fail when run in parallel; fix by making suites serial.
evidence: diff moves TestSortSpillDisk to a SerialSuites suite (executor/executor_pkg_test.go) and marks testFlushSuite as SerialSuites (executor/executor_test.go).
files: executor/executor_pkg_test.go, executor/executor_test.go
evidence: PR body: "fix unit test deadlock" by updating to newest failpoint; references pingcap/failpoint#49.
evidence: diff bumps github.com/pingcap/failpoint version in go.mod/go.sum.
files: go.mod, go.sum
evidence: PR body: "fix occasional tests failed"; tests change global variable wordBufLen causing decimal parse failure in parallel.
evidence: diff creates SerialSuites suite and moves TestShift/TestFromString there (types/mydecimal_test.go).

evidence: PR body says other cases change global mysql.opt_rule_blacklist too; "create a new table without the primary key to make the test stable".
evidence: diff removes mysql.opt_rule_blacklist dependency and uses a local table ta (tk.MustExec("create table ta(a int, b int, index(a))")) in TestAggToCopHint (planner/core/physical_plan_test.go).

evidence: PR body: small float64 may format like "3.2425e-05"; appending "00" makes exponent parse fail (ErrTruncated).

evidence: diff changes random value generation from fmt.Sprintf("%v", float64(rand.Intn(1000))+rand.Float64()) to fmt.Sprintf("%d.%d", rand.Intn(1000), rand.Int31()) to avoid scientific notation (expression/builtin_other_vec_test.go).

evidence: PR title/merge commit says "make unit test TestOptimisticConflicts more stable".
evidence: diff adds cleanup after commit failure: tk.MustExec("rollback") before truncating table conflict (session/pessimistic_test.go).
evidence: diff uses unique keys like kv.Key("x_key_TestSkipLargeTxnLock") to avoid interference in tests (store/tikv/snapshot_test.go).

evidence: PR body says CI makes syncerStop period longer and tests more likely to fail; moves failpoint disabling to avoid a window where syncerStarted is false.
evidence: diff disables failpoint immediately after <-dom.ddl.SchemaSyncer().Done() instead of after polling syncerStarted (domain/domain_test.go).

evidence: PR body: deadlock may be returned by either transaction; assert either of the two meets deadlock error instead of a certain one.
evidence: diff replaces time.Sleep + fixed-side assertion with channel-based synchronization and checks either err1 or err2 is mysql.ErrLockDeadlock (session/pessimistic_test.go).
files: session/pessimistic_test.go
evidence: PR body: shard_bits of AUTO_RANDOM handles are not all zero (instead of requiring each handle non-zero).
evidence: diff changes assertion to track allZero and assert IsFalse, avoiding rare random zero shard bits (executor/ddl_test.go).

evidence: PR body lists Windows-specific nondeterminism/behavior differences (imprecise time.Now(), os.Remove() fails if file still open, unix socket addr issues).

evidence: diff fixes order-/env-dependent tests, e.g. "If we don't SetSystemTZ() here, the value would change unpredictable" (expression/builtin_time_test.go) and relaxes time elapse assertions on windows (executor/hash_table_test.go).
